headline: Krispy Kreme 1Q Adjusted EBITDA Jumps 38% Amid Turnaround
summary: By Daniella Parra Krispy Kreme, Inc. (Nasdaq: DNUT) said adjusted EBITDA rose 38 percent in the first quarter to $33.1 million from a year earlier amid a company turnaround. Net revenue fell 2.2 percent to $367 million, it said, adding that the company is seeing wider adoption of its capital-light international franchise model. “The first […]

headline: A Look At Starbucks (SBUX) Valuation As Shares Show Building Momentum
summary: Key snapshot of Starbucks stock today With no single headline event driving the move, Starbucks (SBUX) is drawing attention as investors look at recent share performance, current valuation signals and the coffee chain's latest reported financial profile. Starbucks carries a market value of about US$119.6b, with reported annual revenue of US$38,471.6m and net income of US$1,495.6m. Recent share returns over the past month, past 3 months and year are giving investors fresh data points to...

headline: Brian Harbour: China remains a huge growth market for fast food companies
summary: Brian Harbour, Analyst for Restaurants and Food Distribution at Morgan Stanley, says China remains a key growth market for fast food, while beverage chains like Dutch Bros continue outperforming the broader restaurant sector.
